summary: Iteration 8 - Tested all new planimetria editor features. All 7 requested features PASS. No regressions on export PNG/PDF/Stampa.

issues: Next.js dev tools '1 Issue' badge visible (not app error, dev tooling only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Event ID 3 used for testing. Planimetria editor fully functional. All export buttons (PNG/PDF/Stampa) working.

1_assenza_pulsante_ruota_90.details: Button with data-testid='piantina-ruota-90-btn' is correctly ABSENT from VillaPiantina.tsx - removed as requested

2_upload_apre_editor_modal.details: File upload triggers editor modal with data-testid='planimetria-editor-modal' containing title 'Ritaglia e Ruota Planimetria'

3_editor_sliders_funzionanti.details: All 4 sliders work: zoom (planimetria-editor-zoom-slider), rotation (planimetria-editor-rotation-slider), offsetX (planimetria-editor-offsetx-slider), offsetY (planimetria-editor-offsety-slider)

4_apply_editor_aggiorna_immagine.details: Apply button (planimetria-editor-apply-btn) processes image via canvas, closes modal, updates background without errors

5_salvataggio_planimetria_evento.details: After Apply, clicking Save (save-piantina-btn) shows '✅ Salvato con successo'. Verified via API that disposizioneSala.immagine contains data:image/jpeg base64

6_libreria_planimetrie_api.details: GET /api/piantine returns list of planimetrie. POST /api/piantine correctly saves new image to /public/planimetrie/ and returns {nome, url}. Count increased from 4 to 5 after test upload.

7_planimetria_area_piena_cover.details: Background style verified: backgroundSize='cover' (inline and computed). Planimetria uses full area, not reduced contain.

api_verification.GET_api_piantine: 200 OK - returns array of {nome, url} objects
api_verification.POST_api_piantine: 200 OK - accepts FormData with file, returns {nome, url}
api_verification.GET_api_eventi_id3: 200 OK - returns event with disposizioneSala containing immagine
api_verification.PUT_api_eventi_id3: 200 OK - saves event with new planimetria image

playwright_tests.page_load: Piantina page loads with all UI elements
playwright_tests.ruota_90_absent: Verified button NOT present in DOM
playwright_tests.editor_modal: Opens on file upload, shows preview and 4 sliders
playwright_tests.save_success: Status message shows success, data persists to API
